subject: fix(boot): await demo seed before app mount to fix empty first load
body:
seedDemoWorkspace() was non-blocking (.then()) while app.mount() ran
synchronously. WorkspaceListView queried the DB before seeding committed,
showing an empty state on first visit. Fix: wrap boot in async IIFE and
await seedDemoWorkspace() before mount. DebugPill changed to dynamic
import() for async IIFE compatibility.

Tags: boot, demo, race-condition, db
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: demo-workspace
Semver: patch
